news.title:
Network18 Media & Investments Ltd repaid Rs 200 cr CPs as per maturity terms.
All 4,000 units redeemed; outstanding amount stands at nil post repayment.
news.summary:
Network18 Media & Investments Ltd repaid Rs 200 cr CPs as per maturity terms.
All 4,000 units redeemed; outstanding amount stands at nil post repayment.

news.title:
Network18 Media repaid ₹125 crore for 2,500 CP units on maturity, ISIN INE870H14WE2.
The repayment was made in full, leaving no outstanding amount as of February 11, 2026.
news.summary:
Network18 Media repaid ₹125 crore for 2,500 CP units on maturity, ISIN INE870H14WE2.
The repayment was made in full, leaving no outstanding amount as of February 11, 2026.

news.title:
Network18 Media repaid ₹300 crore in full for 6,000 CP units on maturity.
Outstanding amount post repayment stands at nil, ensuring timely compliance.
news.summary:
Network18 Media repaid ₹300 crore in full for 6,000 CP units on maturity.
Outstanding amount post repayment stands at nil, ensuring timely compliance.

news.title:
Network18 Media hits 52-week low at Rs 36.8 amid market weakness.
Decline driven by broader market trends and company-specific pressures.
news.summary:
Network18 Media hits 52-week low at Rs 36.8 amid market weakness.
Decline driven by broader market trends and company-specific pressures.

news.title:
Network 18 Media's revenue grew 5% YoY to Rs 500 cr despite weak ads.
TV viewership rose to 14.2%; renewed 10-year CNN partnership; profit hit by exceptions.
news.summary:
Network 18 Media's revenue grew 5% YoY to Rs 500 cr despite weak ads.
TV viewership rose to 14.2%; renewed 10-year CNN partnership; profit hit by exceptions.

news.title:
Network 18 Media reported Q3 revenue of Rs. 1,360.5 Cr, with unaudited results approved.
Exceptional items and new Labour Codes led to Rs. 20.7 Cr additional obligation.
news.summary:
Network 18 Media reported Q3 revenue of Rs. 1,360.5 Cr, with unaudited results approved.
Exceptional items and new Labour Codes led to Rs. 20.7 Cr additional obligation.

news.title:
Network18 Media repaid Rs 75 crore for 1,500 Commercial Paper units on Jan 14, 2026.
Post repayment, no outstanding amount remains, confirming full and timely settlement.
news.summary:
Network18 Media repaid Rs 75 crore for 1,500 Commercial Paper units on Jan 14, 2026.
Post repayment, no outstanding amount remains, confirming full and timely settlement.

news.title:
Network18 Media reports Rs 5.98 crore net loss in Dec 2025 quarter.
Sales decline 60.4% to Rs 539.4 crore in the same period.
news.summary:
Network18 Media reports Rs 5.98 crore net loss in Dec 2025 quarter.
Sales decline 60.4% to Rs 539.4 crore in the same period.

news.title:
Reliance Group's companies, including RIL, Jio Financial, and Network18, are pursuing aggressive expansions, targeting capacity scaling and new growth segments.
Jio Financial showed 12x AUM growth YoY; Network18 expanded regional presence; RIL progresses in solar, battery storage, and retail.
news.summary:
Reliance Group's companies, including RIL, Jio Financial, and Network18, are pursuing aggressive expansions, targeting capacity scaling and new growth segments.
Jio Financial showed 12x AUM growth YoY; Network18 expanded regional presence; RIL progresses in solar, battery storage, and retail.

news.title:
Network18 Media & Investments Ltd repaid ₹250 crore in full for CPs maturing on Dec 10, 2025.
The repayment covered 5,000 CP units with no outstanding amount remaining.
news.summary:
Network18 Media & Investments Ltd repaid ₹250 crore in full for CPs maturing on Dec 10, 2025.
The repayment covered 5,000 CP units with no outstanding amount remaining.

news.title:
Network18 Media repays full maturity amount of ₹150 cr for 3000 CP units.
The repayment was made on time with no outstanding amount remaining.
news.summary:
Network18 Media repays full maturity amount of ₹150 cr for 3000 CP units.
The repayment was made on time with no outstanding amount remaining.

news.title:
Network18 Media repaid Rs.75 cr for 1,500 CP units on maturity date Nov 11, 2025.
Full repayment leaves no outstanding amount, confirmed by authorized signatory.
news.summary:
Network18 Media repaid Rs.75 cr for 1,500 CP units on maturity date Nov 11, 2025.
Full repayment leaves no outstanding amount, confirmed by authorized signatory.

news.title:
Network18 Media has repaid 4,500 CP units worth ₹225 Cr upon maturity on Nov 3, 2025.
The company confirmed no outstanding amount post repayment, as shared by its authorized signatory.
news.summary:
Network18 Media has repaid 4,500 CP units worth ₹225 Cr upon maturity on Nov 3, 2025.

news.title:
Network18 sees promising H2 driven by subscription, events; Q2FY26 revenue rises 7% to ₹477 crore.
Moneycontrol boosts non-advertising revenue to 30%, launches Super Pro, lending with HDFC Bank.
news.summary:
Network18 sees promising H2 driven by subscription, events; Q2FY26 revenue rises 7% to ₹477 crore.
Moneycontrol boosts non-advertising revenue to 30%, launches Super Pro, lending with HDFC Bank.

news.title:
Network18 acquired shares and a debenture of IBN Lokmat for Rs. 25 crores.
This acquisition makes IBN Lokmat a wholly owned subsidiary of Network18.
news.summary:
Network18 acquired shares and a debenture of IBN Lokmat for Rs. 25 crores.
This acquisition makes IBN Lokmat a wholly owned subsidiary of Network18.

news.title:
Network18's news revenue rose 7% YoY to Rs. 477 crore despite weak ad market.
Network18 fully owns News18 Lokmat; Moneycontrol fintech expands via HDFC partnership.
news.summary:
Network18's news revenue rose 7% YoY to Rs. 477 crore despite weak ad market.
Network18 fully owns News18 Lokmat; Moneycontrol fintech expands via HDFC partnership.

news.title:
Network18 posts Q2 net profit of ₹407M, reversing ₹958M loss YoY.
Revenue drops to ₹4.97B in Q2, down from ₹18.25B YoY.
news.summary:
Network18 posts Q2 net profit of ₹407M, reversing ₹958M loss YoY.
Revenue drops to ₹4.97B in Q2, down from ₹18.25B YoY.
